transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Are you going to the exam review session tomorrow?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Definitely. The professor said it will cover the most important topics for the final exam.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the woman attending the review session?

questions.prompt: Why is the woman attending the review session?

choices.text: To review the most important exam topics.
To meet with an academic advisor.

questions.explanation: She says the professor will review the most important topics for the final exam.
questions.evidence: It will cover the most important topics for the final exam.
